name: Agricultural Sustainability Audit
description: Whole-farm sustainability assessment. Synthesizes findings across an operation's soil health, water management, energy use, biodiversity, economic resilience, and social practices to produce a scored sustainability profile with improvement priorities and program eligibility flags. Designed to run downstream of other agriculture packs — vault inheritance pulls prior assessment findings directly.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Farm Sustainability Report
types.description: Generated farm sustainability report from intake session data.
